payload.answer: If you want, tell me your current level (beginner/intermediate), your goal (e.g., learning concepts, building a KG, querying, or schema design), and any target ecosystem (RDF/OWL, property graphs, Neo4j, etc.). Then I can tailor a learning path and examples.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific knowledge-graph facts were provided—only a general learning request—so there is nothing durable to store.

details: No durable memory committed because the input contains only an open-ended request.

repair_options: Share a specific statement you want remembered (e.g., a definition, a model, a tool recommendation) and I can store that.
Tell me a topic focus (RDF vs property graphs, SPARQL, OWL, ontology design) and I can store that preference if you confirm it.
